author: realbarnakiss
content:
Hey everyone

I have implemented zk-autoresearch (based on Karpathy's autoresearch) to target Plonky3 

Still prelim results, and I am planning to run 1 more full experiment (100 iterations) before I will publish the full results and details. 
We are in progress with Plonky3 team to check each optimization it found for soundness. 

I hope you also find this interesting 

https://x.com/realbarnakiss/status/2037120329131147430

EDIT: A recurring question - Yes I will open source the full setup soon
